narration: Millions of Americans set up a special account where their own money literally vanishes every December. It's called an FSA, and it's draining your wallet right now.
visual: Dark background. Piggy bank SVG with dollar bills floating upward and fading out. Text overlay: 'YOUR MONEY IS DISAPPEARING'. Amber accent.

narration: A Flexible Spending Account lets you pay for medical expenses with pre-tax dollars — that's an instant thirty percent discount on healthcare. But there's a brutal catch hiding in the fine print.
visual: Light background. Medical cross SVG beside a dollar sign. Progress bar fills to show '30% SAVINGS'. Red text fades in: 'BUT THERE IS A CATCH'.

narration: The catch is use-it-or-lose-it. December 31st is the deadline — whatever balance sits in your account that day, your employer legally gets to keep it.
visual: Dark background. Calendar showing DECEMBER 31 drops in from top. Dollar bill falls and disappears into trash can at bottom. Text: 'USE IT OR LOSE IT'.

narration: The average FSA holder forfeits four hundred and eight dollars of their own money every single year. Across all thirty-five million accounts, that is one-point-six billion dollars gone.
visual: Light background. Large animated counter counting up to $408. Red bar labeled '$1.6 BILLION LOST' fills across screen. Text: 'AVERAGE ANNUAL FORFEIT'.

narration: Here is what most people miss — FSAs cover way more than just doctor visits. Glasses, sunscreen, bandages, and even some baby gear all qualify. You can spend it today.
visual: Dark background. Four items spring in one by one: eyeglasses, sunscreen bottle, bandage with cross, baby bottle. Each labeled. Text: 'FSA COVERS MORE THAN YOU THINK'.

narration: Pull up your FSA balance right now. If you have got money sitting there, spend it before December ends — do not hand your employer a free four hundred and eight dollars.
visual: Light background. Phone screen showing FSA balance counting up to $408. Calendar showing DEC 31. Pulsing amber CTA button. Text: 'CHECK YOUR BALANCE TODAY'.
